item.title: Illegal dog meat processing ops busted; 5 Vietnamese arrested
item.description: Authorities on Tuesday uncovered and shut down an illegal dog meat processing and online selling operation allegedly run by Vietnamese nationals following a joint entrapment operation in Pasay and Makati.

item.title: 'Matagal na ko nagtitimpi': Lacson says 'enough is enough' on Marcoleta's tirades
item.description: Lacson said tried to hold back from reacting when Marcoleta rebuked him in a privilege speech last week—but he said 'enough is enough' when he 'attacked' him again in plenary on Monday.

item.title: AFP says BRP Sierra Madre personnel data may have been compromised
item.description: The Armed Forces of the Philippine said sensitive information regarding personnel deployed aboard the BRP Sierra Madre may have been compromised following the discovery of espionage operations and foreign-directed malign activities in the country connected to China.

item.title: Comelec sees 'complication' in resolving Marcoleta's SOCE matter; vows to fast-track resolution
item.description: The Comelec on Wednesday cited "complications" in resolving the issue surrounding the Statement of Contributions and Expenditures (SOCE) of Senator Rodante Marcoleta after a related complaint was referred by the Office of the Ombudsman earlier this week.

item.title: PNP warns public vs vacation scams ahead of Holy Week, summer
item.description: The Philippine National Police Anti-Cybercrime Group (PNP-ACG) has warned the public against vacation or accommodation scams as the Holy Week break and summer season approach.

item.title: Rhian Ramos to pursue possible legal action over driver’s assault claims
item.description: Actress Rhian Ramos said she is already looking into possible legal actions against her former driver, who alleged that she, Michelle Dee, and Sam Panlilio physically assaulted and illegally detained him back in January.

item.title: ‘I am deeply sorry’: Suntay’s wife breaks silence on husband's Anne Curtis remark
item.description: The wife of Rep. Bong Suntay has issued a public statement distancing herself and her children from the controversial remarks the Quezon City lawmaker made during a House impeachment hearing, after his comments referencing actress Anne Curtis sparked widespread backlash online.

item.title: No double standard in impeachment proceedings — House justice panel members
item.description: Leaders of the House Committee on Justice asserted there was no double standard in its deliberations on the impeachment complaints against the country’s two highest officials.

item.title: DSWD urges stronger cooperation among ASEAN states amid global tensions
item.description: Social Welfare Secretary Rex Gatchalian called on other members of the Association of Southeast Asian Nations (ASEAN) for stronger cooperation amid global headwinds.

item.title: Man wanted for inciting to sedition surrenders to police
item.description: The Quezon City Police District on Thursday said it has successfully served a warrant of arrest against an individual wanted for inciting to sedition.
